reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.6.5: fixes a regression introduced in 0.6.0 where every tile render raised TypeError because the Inkscape canvas monkey-patch did not accept the new project_revision argument. The error was swallowed by the render worker, leaving tiles unrendered. Also skips layers with no objects in a tile, which alone wasted up to 436 ms per render on a 20-layer document.
